ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: A system that provides a streamlined way of generating publication-ready plots for known single-cell transcriptomics data in a "publication ready" format. The goal is to automatically generate plots with the highest quality possible so they can be used right away or with minimal modifications for a research article.

A system that provides a streamlined way of generating publication-ready plots for known single-cell transcriptomics data in a "publication ready" format. The goal is to automatically generate plots with the highest quality possible so they can be used right away or with minimal modifications for a research article.

name: r-scpubr
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '3.0.1' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-scpubr
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/SCpubr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/SCpubr/SCpubr_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 126e4c53b2b5918d56194284fe7f0ddeadf38add41ee1e8207cd1b4b1da42125

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
  run:
    - r-base

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('SCpubr')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('SCpubr')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/enblacar/SCpubr/
  doc_url: https://enblacar.github.io/SCpubr-book/
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: A system that provides a streamlined way of generating publication-ready
    plots for known single-cell transcriptomics data in a "publication ready" format.
    The goal is to automatically generate plots with the highest quality possible
    so they can be used right away or with minimal modifications for a research article.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: SCpubr
# Type: Package

# Title: Generate Publication Ready Visualizations of Single Cell Transcriptomics Data

# Authors@R: person("Enrique", "Blanco-Carmona", , "scpubr@gmail.com", role = c("cre", "aut"), comment = c(ORCID = "0000-0002-1208-1691"))
# Description: A system that provides a streamlined way of generating publication ready plots for known Single-Cell transcriptomics data in a publication ready format. This is, the goal is to automatically generate plots with the highest quality possible, that can be used right away or with minimal modifications for a research article.
